̳)ฅ","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0mWBZgOTCxa8NuBOt2mpQHg+o9uODyhr4Xa3m/Ym1Tu","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/100dd30b8ef44cfeafc860f946cd2326~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703101&x-signature=Pg%2B%2BEBMCufzLcXYmkgSVDowRryc%3D","user_id":"1926823952524493","user_name":"心愿音律"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1926823952524493","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7574796924348288062","book_info":{"abstract":"【亮懿】➕【双男主】➕【前世今生】
司马懿喜欢诸葛，但诸葛力争大业，无法给予他回应。
诸葛死后，司马懿过得浑浑噩噩。
直到他也尘归尘土归土，再睁眼时面前却是风光霁月的诸葛。
那张脸和记忆里的诸葛重叠，司马懿克制不住的心动了。
他一边压着心中的疑虑努力扮演起原身，一边暗中调查自己所处的地方。而那位也早就察觉到了面前人的怪异，一声不吭的将秘密藏在了心底。
司马懿原以为，这位和那位是一个人，相处到后面才发现根本不同。
流氓。
司马懿心想。
不过……
他看着那张相似的脸，说不出一句拒绝的话。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o16010ad50df65000b1cd33c8cd069d14~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"哑妮","author_id":"","book_id":"7574796924348288062","book_name":"亮懿，仲达你不乘哦","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7574807011108340286","read_count":"863","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"285452"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"133","tags":"双男主,纯爱,古代,异世穿越,重生,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o16010ad50df65000b1cd33c8cd069d14~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779301057&x-signature=4I%2B4k4TDu9SGdO3W%2FbAKrnka0Uc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"285523028216636","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"229"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202173742C82FF465F0314AA095"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwar
